name: codex-review-council
description: Add Copilot CLI as a second local code reviewer when explicitly requested.

interface.shortDescription: Combine Codex and Copilot code reviews
interface.longDescription: Use Codex Review Council to keep the normal Codex development flow while adding GitHub Copilot CLI with a Claude model as a second local reviewer when explicitly requested.
defaultPrompt: Use Copilot as a second reviewer for this change.
Run a review council with Codex and Copilot.
Have Copilot cross-check the local diff.
